messages.text: Hey Alice, quick reminder about our log rotation policy. We need to keep log files under 100KB in the logs folder. Anything larger should be moved to the archive folder, and we create fresh empty logs to replace them. Can you run the rotation when you get a chance? The logs directory is in your home folder. Just email me a quick summary when you're done. Thanks!
Team reminder: log rotation should be done regularly. Keep logs under 100KB, archive the rest.
